notes: Each scenario names the fixture state it depends on and the observable outcome. 'mutations' are applied to the mock data before the run, so a scenario never depends on editing a shared fixture in place.

assertions: L-1001-H (stale $34,900 listing, 142 days on market) is trimmed or down-weighted and does not raise the internal estimate above the external anchor by more than 5%
pricing_scenarios has exactly 3 entries sharing one simulation_id
MAXIMIZE_GROSS price >= BALANCED price >= INCREASE_VELOCITY price
price_to_market_ratio > poor_deal_threshold
recommended BALANCED price is below current_list_price
no BLOCKING warning: an overpriced vehicle is a repricing opportunity, not a publication bar

scenarios.name: P50 under 90 days, P90 over 90 days

assertions: projected_total_inventory_age.p50 < 90 and .p90 > 90
the P90 warning is severity LOW -- a 10% chance of exceeding 90 days is unremarkable, and ranking it above its P50 counterpart would invert the alarm

scenarios.name: Both P50 and P90 over 90 days

assertions: P50 warning severity is MEDIUM, strictly above the LOW severity of the P90 warning
recommended strategy is INCREASE_VELOCITY
days_in_inventory 96 already exceeds 90, so projected age exceeds it in every draw
current_accounting_break_even (~$28,963) > market_value ($25,100)
market_value_crossover_risk.break_even_exceeds_market_value_now is true
the system does NOT recommend a price above the market ceiling to manufacture a paper break-even
approvals_required includes LOSS_MINIMIZATION
expected_front_end_gross.p50 is negative and is reported as negative, not clamped to zero
max_safe_discount is well under $1,500 (list $19,495 vs minimum_safe_list_price ~$18,822)
DISCOUNT_EXCEEDS_SAFE_HEADROOM is BLOCKING and blocks_publication is true
the recommended price is reported unchanged next to the warning, never silently raised to the floor
max_safe_discount > $3,000 (list $27,995 against a cost basis near $23,615)
promotional_headroom.reserves sum to max_safe_discount
economically_sensible_discount < max_safe_discount -- the optimum is interior, not at the floor
only 2 comparables exist, below min_comparables (5)
valuation.internal_estimate is null -- a weighted median of two listings must not be presented as a second opinion
valuation.divergence is null
a valuation is still returned, from the external anchor alone
market position effective_date 2026-07-18 exceeds the DAILY 24h threshold at the overridden as_of
analysis still completes -- stale data degrades, it does not stop the analysis
valuation confidence is reduced one level
publication is barred only if a REALTIME-class source is also stale
staleness comes from advancing as_of, not from editing the fixture (D8)
effective monthly rate reflects EV segment 0.026 x BEV multiplier 1.45
EV segment median_days_to_sale is 68, so the holding period is long and compounds the loss
depreciation_loss.p90 corresponds to value_at_sale.p10, NOT value_at_sale.p90 -- the D1 inversion check
both value_at_sale and depreciation_loss are emitted as full percentile sets
P50_TRANSACTION_PRICE_BELOW_BREAK_EVEN is BLOCKING
approvals_required includes LOSS_MINIMIZATION
the approval payload quantifies all five §19.2 figures: immediate_loss, expected_future_loss, expected_holding_cost, expected_depreciation, capacity_opportunity_cost
the system presents both sides of the comparison and does not decide
publication remains barred until an approval_id exists

scenarios.name: Missing cost basis is a hard stop

assertions: INSUFFICIENT_VEHICLE_DATA escalates to BLOCKING when cost basis is missing
no break_even_analysis is produced
no pricing recommendation is produced -- a recommendation without a floor is the failure §4.5 exists to prevent
the agent asks for acquisition and reconditioning cost rather than estimating them
market_value falls back to the internal comparable estimate
confidence is capped at MEDIUM
analysis completes rather than failing
divergence exceeds 0.10, so severity escalates to HIGH
market_supported_range widens to contain both estimates
market_value REMAINS the external anchor -- divergence never moves the point estimate toward the internal figure
valuation confidence drops one level
V-10006 has no engagement fixture entry
the hazard model drops the engagement term rather than substituting a default multiplier
confidence is reduced
no calculation fails -- no downstream figure may require this tool
